properties.query: INSERT INTO PAYMENT (payment_amount, payment_method, status, student_id, course_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?);

SELECT c.course_id, c.title AS course_title, SUM(p.payment_amount) AS total_revenue FROM COURSE c JOIN PAYMENT p ON c.course_id = p.course_id WHERE p.status = true GROUP BY c.course_id, c.title ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
SELECT payment_id, payment_amount, payment_method, status, paid_at, student_id, course_id FROM payment WHERE status = ? AND paid_at > ? AND paid_at <= ?
